description: Phase 1b labeled evaluation dataset — seed subset for Wave 1 harness validation. Authoritative baseline requires Wave 2 pilot/client data (#307).

grading_scale.0: irrelevant — chunk has no useful information for the query
grading_scale.1: partially relevant — chunk contains related but incomplete information
grading_scale.2: fully relevant — chunk directly answers or substantially addresses the query

wave: 1 — seed subset (5 queries, manually labeled). chunk_index values match test ingestion (0-based, single-chunk-per-doc). Wave 2 requires #307 pilot data with production chunk indices.

samples.query: What chunking strategies does the knowledge system support?

relevant_chunks.reason: Directly lists all chunking strategies with descriptions

samples.query: How does document deduplication work during ingestion?

relevant_chunks.reason: Describes SHA-256 hashing, two-phase atomic replace

samples.query: What authentication methods are used for knowledge routes?

relevant_chunks.reason: Describes dual-path auth: operator session + bot bearer

samples.query: What is the maximum context token budget for knowledge injection?
How does the bot-scope binding work at runtime?

relevant_chunks.reason: Describes BotKnowledgeIndex singleton, CRD annotations, O(1) resolve
